title: 2017 Amy Tangerine Design Team Call!!
excerpt: As I ease back into the routine after an amazing Creativation (formerly CHA show), where I debuted my latest collection with American Crafts, I am excited to announce the 2017 call for Amy Tangerine design team members! It's the first…
body:
As I ease back into the routine after an amazing Creativation (formerly CHA show), where I debuted my latest collection with American Crafts, I am excited to announce the 2017 call for Amy Tangerine design team members! It's the first time we are doing something like this and I can't wait to have some talented creatives be a part of Team Tangerine. One of the best parts about my collaboration with AC is seeing my ideas come to life on your papercrafting projects. It feels like such a treat to be a part of your memories! If you're interested in becoming one of my design team members and are willing to share 3 (sometimes 4) projects of your creations per month on social media and contribute to this blog, please send an email to amytangerineDT@gmail.com by February 5, 2017 and include the following information:

1. LINKS. Link(s) to your blog and Instagram account (if applicable) - basically wherever you share your paper projects on the internet

2. ABOUT YOU. A short paragraph about yourself, including: where you're from, how long you've been scrabooking and/or papercrafting, what you love about Amy Tangerine products, and how you would describe your style. Also include whether you are currently on any other design teams and which ones.

3. PHOTOS. Attach .jpegs of 2 scrapbook layouts, 1 card or planner spread, and 1 other type of project that best showcases your style (mini album, pocket page spread, planner spread). Photos must be 1500 px wide or smaller - please no more than 1MB in size - large attachments will not be accepted or considered. Thanks for understanding!

Please use: DT 2017 in the subject line so we don't miss your application.

2017 design team members will be notified via e-mail by Monday February 13th and announced here on the blog in late February. Thanks so much!
